title: lathyrus filiformis var. bauhini
intro: Lathyrus filiformis var. bauhini, also known as the slender pea or Bauhin's vetchling, is a perennial herbaceous plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and possessing antimicrobial properties. The slender pea is typically prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and applications.
